zh.lifeSummary: 當Eléonore de Penthièvre於1092年出生在法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫迪南時，她的父親Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond27歲，母親Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp28歲。她和Alain de Dinan至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eléonore de Penthièvre于1092年出生在法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫迪南时，她的父亲Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond27岁，母亲Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp28岁。她和Alain de Dinan至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eléonore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Eléonore de Penthièvre was born in 1092, in Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France, her father, Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond, was 27 and her mother, Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, was 28. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Alain de Dinan. She died in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eléonore de Penthièvre est née en 1092, à Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France, son père, Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Alain de Dinan. Elle est décédée à Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eléonore de Penthièvre 1092 in Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond 27 und ihre Mutter Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp 28. Sie hatte mit Alain de Dinan mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eléonore de Penthièvre è nata il nel 1092 nel Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Alain de Dinan. Morì nel Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Eléonore de Penthièvreが1092年にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ド'アルモーディナンで生まれた時，父Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmondは27歳，母Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingampは28歳であった。彼女はAlain de Dinanとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女はフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインヴィトルeで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eléonore de Penthièvre(이)가 1092년 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드'아모르 딘아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Alain de Dinan(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 비트e에서 사망했다.

mn.North Riding, Yorkshire, England: Cleveland, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eléonore de Penthièvre nasceu em 1092, em Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Alain de Dinan. Ela faleceu em Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eléonore de Penthièvre родилась в 1092 г. в местности динан, кoтес-д'армор, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, 28. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Alain de Dinan. Она умерла в местности витрe, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eléonore de Penthièvre nació en 1092, en Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Etienne de Penthièvre Count of Treguier, 3rd Lord of Richmond, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Hawise Guincamp Countess of Guingamp, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Alain de Dinan. Murió en Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia.
